text: The surgeon performs a combined operation using a keyhole technique followed by a conduit creation without mesh. After establishing pneumoperitoneum on the right flank, two trochars are inserted: a 5mm trochar in the right iliac fossa and a 10mm trochar at the epigastrium. Adhesions are freed circumferentially. A DynaMesh IPOM mesh is cut and inserted through the 10mm trochar, surrounding the bowel. The mesh is fixed to the abdominal wall with absorbable and non-absorbable tacks, and its cut margins overlap and are closed with stitches, wrapping the bowel as it exits the abdominal cavity.
